label: Team Roster
summary: Instructions-only soft dossier for a team/staff section: a responsive grid of monogram cards, each showing a member's name and role, server-rendered with semantic markup and no client JS. Team data is static project-input content (company.team) - the section renders nothing for an empty team rather than inventing people. Reuses the existing render_section_team renderer; the section_builder follow-up role mounts it for a 'team' section_add through the same apply chain component_add uses.
